narrative:
Perry Twp township has 1,492 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.9 percentage points.
